scope.summary: Normalizes the full engineering-program import manifest from live tracker provenance and validates it with the plan-bead-graph/v2 lint.
out_of_scope: No Beads status changes were made for any imported task other than closing this bead through the guarded path.
No promotion was applied; the manifest remains a read-only import/reuse plan.
No sibling rust-oracledb repository files or driver dependency overrides were touched.
Unrelated shared-checkout dirty files were not used as evidence.

entry_points.name: manifest builder selftest
entry_points.trace: `python3 scripts/eng_program_manifest_build.py --selftest` exited 0 and printed `eng_program_manifest_build selftest: OK (normalizes tracker/plan provenance; fabrication is detectable; no tracker mutation)`.

entry_points.name: plan-bead-graph lint selftest
entry_points.trace: `python3 scripts/plan_bead_graph_lint.py --selftest` exited 0 with 15 mutation checks, including missing acceptance text, release target disagreement, label dot rejection, same-repository handoff rejection, promoted task depending on a deferred task, and dangling live tracker edge rejection.

entry_points.name: manifest generation
entry_points.trace: `python3 scripts/eng_program_manifest_build.py --out engineering-program-manifest.json --punch-list` exited 0, wrote 174 tasks, and printed `174/174 tasks fully authored` with missing scope=0, missing acceptance=0, missing evidence=0.

entry_points.name: committed manifest lint
entry_points.trace: `python3 scripts/plan_bead_graph_lint.py --manifest engineering-program-manifest.json | tee tests/artifacts/plan_graph/engineering-program-manifest-lint.txt` exited 0 and saved a PASS line for program=engineering-program, tasks=174, repositories=1, promotions=deferred:2,excluded:124,held:48, hard=0.

limitations: The manifest evidence anchors for unfinished beads prove the import mapping and source provenance; they are not task-completion proof for those beads.
The manifest records read-only reuse dispositions only. It does not open, close, defer, undefer, or promote any imported bead.
